seoContent.title: Daily trivia questions for
seoContent.description: Handpicked trivia questions, fresh every day, across science, history, pop culture, geography, sports, food, psychology, and more.
seoContent.intro: This is a daily trivia site built around carefully selected questions rather than random quiz filler. Every set is short, approachable, and made to spark curiosity, whether you want today's trivia, a quick trivia quiz, or archived trivia questions from an earlier day.

sections.title: Handpicked daily trivia questions
sections.content: Each Daily Trivia set features five handpicked trivia questions chosen to feel surprising, clear, and worth thinking about. The goal is not endless volume. The goal is a better daily trivia quiz that gives curious people something fresh to enjoy every day.

sections.title: Trivia across science, history, pop culture, and more
sections.content: Daily Trivia is not limited to one type of question. The categories can include Science and Nature, Tech and Innovation, Pop Culture, Lifestyle and Fun, Geography, History, Sports, Music, Sociology, Art and Culture, General Knowledge, Food and Drink, Psychology, Linguistics, Environment and Climate, Business and Economics, and Architecture.

sections.title: Trivia questions with answers and explanations
sections.content: People often search for daily trivia questions and answers, not just the question itself. Every set is designed to be more useful than a bare quiz prompt, with clear answers and explanations that make each question feel satisfying after you play.

sections.title: Today's trivia, plus a full trivia archive
sections.content: You can play today's trivia when a new set goes live, then browse the trivia archive to revisit previous trivia questions and older daily quiz sets. That makes the site useful both as a question of the day habit and as a growing library of archived trivia.

sections.title: Built to spark curiosity, not just test memory
sections.content: The tone of Daily Trivia is intentionally human and curiosity-driven. These are carefully selected trivia questions made to nudge you toward a new fact, a better explanation, or a small moment of surprise, which is why handpicked daily trivia feels different from random free online trivia lists.

sections.title: A quick trivia quiz for a daily routine
sections.content: Whether you call it daily trivia, today's trivia, a trivia question of the day, or a free online trivia quiz, the idea is the same: come back for five fresh questions, learn something new, and keep moving. It is a lightweight habit built around good questions.

seoContent.conclusion: Play a new set of handpicked trivia questions every day, review the answers and explanations, and browse the archive whenever you want more.
